title: xanthophytum ferrugineum
intro: Xanthophytum ferrugineum, also known as Java tea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia. The medicinal properties of Xanthophytum ferrugineum lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Java tea include reducing inflammation, improving mental clarity, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Xanthophytum ferrugineum is typically prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it can also be found in capsule or tincture form as a dietary supplement.
